exists payment_transition_log drop constraint if exists FKi15m2a3cnw0l7p1jfc1pvx15a Hibernate: alter table if exists refund drop constraint if exists FKeoh1147brjy6m009cswl5lty4 Hibernate: alter table if exists settlement_payment drop constraint if exists FK11x8ihxqap99rjvw65eitmmd Hibernate: drop table if exists api_key cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists app_user cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists card_token cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists customer cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists dlq_event cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists merchant cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists merchant_webhook_config cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists order_records cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists payment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists payment_transition_log cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists refund cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists settlement cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists settlement_payment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists vault_card cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists webhook_event cascade Hibernate: create table api_key (enabled boolean not null, grace_period_expires_at timestamp(6), last_used_at timestamp(6), rotated_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, environment varchar(20) not null check ((environment in ('LIVE','TEST'))), key_id varchar(50) not null unique, key_secret_hash varchar(200) not null, previous_key_secret_hash varchar(200), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table app_user (id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid, email varchar(255) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check ((role in ('OWNER','ADMIN','TEAM'))), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table card_token (revoked_at timestamp(6), customer uuid not null, id uuid not null, merchant uuid not null, vault_card_id uuid not null, token varchar(50) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table customer (deleted_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, contact_number varchar(20), email varchar(200), name varchar(200), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table dlq_event (moved_at timestamp(6), replayed_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, webhook_event_id uuid unique, final_error varchar(1000), payload jsonb not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table merchant (status smallint not null check ((status between 0 and 2)), id uuid not null, contact_number varchar(20), gst_id varchar(20), pan_id varchar(20), settlement_bank_ifsc varchar(20), business_type varchar(50) check ((business_type in ('LLP','PROPRIETORSHIP','PARTNERSHIP','PRIVATE_LIMITED','PUBLIC_LIMITED','TRUST'))), business_name varchar(100), settlement_bank_account_holder_name varchar(100), name varchar(200) not null, settlement_bank_account varchar(200), website_url varchar(200), email varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table merchant_webhook_config (enabled boolean not null, id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, target_url varchar(500) not null, event_types varchar(255), webhook_secret_hash varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table order_records (amount_units integer, attempts integer not null, expires_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, order_status varchar(20) not null check ((order_status in ('CREATED','ATTEMPTED','PAID','CANCELLED'))), receipt varchar(100), currency varchar(255), notes jsonb, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payment (amount_units integer, authorized_at timestamp(6), captured_at timestamp(6), failed_at timestamp(6), refunded_at timestamp(6), settled_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, order_id uuid not null, bank_reference varchar(100), error_code varchar(100), idempotency_key varchar(100) not null, currency varchar(255), error_description varchar(255), payment_method varchar(255) check ((payment_method in ('CARD','NETBANKING','UPI','WALLET'))), status varchar(255) not null check ((status in ('CREATED','AUTHORIZING','AUTHORIZED','CAPTURING','CAPTURED','FAILED','CANCELLED','REFUND','PARTIALLY_REFUNDED','SETTLED','AUTH_EXPIRED'))), method_details jsonb, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payment_transition_log (occurred_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, payment_id uuid not null, to_status varchar(30) not null check ((to_status in ('CREATED','AUTHORIZING','AUTHORIZED','CAPTURING','CAPTURED','FAILED','CANCELLED','REFUND','PARTIALLY_REFUNDED','SETTLED','AUTH_EXPIRED'))), actor varchar(100) not null check ((actor in ('CUSTOMER','MERCHANT','SYSTEM'))), event varchar(255) not null check ((event in ('AUTHORIZING_ATTEMPT','AUTHORIZE_SUCCESS','AUTHORIZE_FAIL','CAPTURE_ATTEMPT','CAPTURE_REQUEST','CAPTURE_FAIL','CAPTURE_SUCCESS','REFUND_INIT','REFUND_COMPLETED','SETTLE','CANCEL','CAPTURE_TIMEOUT'))), from_status varchar(255) not null check ((from_status in ('CREATED','AUTHORIZING','AUTHORIZED','CAPTURING','CAPTURED','FAILED','CANCELLED','REFUND','PARTIALLY_REFUNDED','SETTLED','AUTH_EXPIRED'))), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table refund (amount_units integer, processed_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, payment_id uuid not null, bank_reference varchar(100), error_code varchar(100), error_description varchar(500), currency varchar(255), status varchar(255) check ((status in ('PENDING','PROCESSING','PROCESSED','FAILED'))), notes jsonb, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table settlement (fee_amount_units integer not null, gross_amount_units integer not null, gst_amount_units integer not null, net_amount_units integer not null, refund_amount_units integer not null, processed_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, status varchar(20) not null check ((status in ('INITIATED','PROCESSED','FAILED'))), bank_reference varchar(50) not null, fee_amount_currency varchar(255) not null, gross_amount_currency varchar(255) not null, gst_amount_currency varchar(255) not null, net_amount_currency varchar(255) not null, refund_amount_currency varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table settlement_payment (payment_id uuid not null, settlement_id uuid not null, primary key (payment_id, settlement_id)) Hibernate: create table vault_card (last_four varchar(4) not null, bin varchar(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, brand varchar(255) not null, card_holder_name varchar(255) not null, expiry_month varchar(255) not null, expiry_year varchar(255) not null, encrypted_dek bytea not null, encrypted_pan bytea not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table webhook_event (attempts integer not null, lase_response_code integer, delivered_at timestamp(6), last_attempt_at timestamp(6), next_retry_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, merchant_id uuid not null, event_type varchar(100) not null, last_response_body varchar(1000), signature varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null check ((status in ('PENDING','DELIVERED','FAILED','DEAD'))), target_url varchar(255) not null, payload jsonb, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create index idx_api_key_merchant_env on api_key (merchant_id, environment, enabled) Hibernate: create index idx_app_user_merchant_id on app_user (merchant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_coustomer_merchant_id on customer (merchant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_customer_email on customer (email) Hibernate: create index idx_merchant_status on merchant (status) Hibernate: create index idx_webhook_merchant_id on merchant_webhook_config (merchant_id, enabled) Hibernate: create index idx_order_id_merchant_id on order_records (id, merchant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_order_merchant_id on order_records (merchant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_payment_order_id on payment (order_id) Hibernate: create index idx_payment_merchant_id on payment (merchant_id) Hibernate: create index idx_payment_transition_log_payment_id on payment_transition_log (payment_id) Hibernate: alter table if exists api_key add constraint FKe8e15uritb2pto9w7hepoxqor foreign key (merchant_id) references merchant Hibernate: alter table if exists app_user add constraint FKjksmfgh6vcrbc0fow9oecdamf foreign key (merchant_id) references merchant Hibernate: alter table if exists card_token add constraint FKfcuhwnqaybadjnid0pigv3n0g foreign key (vault_card_id) references vault_card Hibernate: alter table if exists customer add constraint FKegoqw2qeun0mllg61gt5jdd6h foreign key (merchant_id) references merchant Hibernate: alter table if exists dlq_event add constraint FKqv72xi3tag231hjexxkni4q6a foreign key (webhook_event_id) references webhook_event Hibernate: alter table if exists merchant_webhook_config add constraint FKt4q07s1ff5ifr43s1u9vmfb5f foreign key (merchant_id) references merchant Hibernate: alter table if exists payment add constraint FK8av61emvf2ledklfusj1m5ei4 foreign key (order_id) references order_records Hibernate: alter table if exists payment_transition_log add constraint FKi15m2a3cnw0l7p1jfc1pvx15a foreign key (payment_id) references payment Hibernate: alter table if exists refund add constraint FKeoh1147brjy6m009cswl5lty4 foreign key (payment_id) references payment Hibernate: alter table if exists settlement_payment add constraint FK11x8ihxqap99rjvw65eitmmd foreign key (settlement_id) references settlement 2026-06-23T10:27:25.564+05:30 INFO 38268 --- [razorpay] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-23T10:27:25.662+05:30 INFO 38268 --- [razorpay] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactories : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-06-23T10:27:26.085+05:30 WARN 38268 --- [razorpay] [ main] Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK.
